usMarkets.note: S&P 500 off record highs, AI tech stocks under pressure ahead of Mag 7 earnings. Fed expected to hold rates (Powell's likely final meeting). Visa +5% pre-market on strong earnings.

commodities.note: Oil extends multi-day rally, Brent tops $114 intraday. Trump issues new threats to Iran, Middle East supply concerns.

crypto.note: White House teases announcement on $25B BTC strategic reserve. Mastercard bridges AI agents with crypto wallets.

hongKong.note: HK rebound. HKEX Q1 revenue +20%, profit +27% (record high). Ping An +6%, Taiping +5% on strong earnings. Solid-state battery stocks rally. South-bound net sell HK$3.9B.
